title: Sovryn - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by minting and burning tokens to manipulate price on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls mint() or burn() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx
prevention.trigger: FLASHLOAN_BORROW -> mint() OR burn() in single tx

red_flags: Manipulation of token prices through minting and burning
monitoring_rules: BLOCK mint() OR burn() if preceded by FLASHLOAN_BORROW in the same transaction
summary: The attack involved using a flash loan to manipulate token prices by minting and burning tokens, allowing the attacker to profit. A guard could have blocked such transactions by preventing mint() or burn() calls immediately following a flash loan.
